summary: Complete testing of session changes: Marketplace enriched mentor profiles, offer publish toggle, influencer dashboard Stripe Connect UX, and FAB button. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirms all features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All marketplace enriched mentor profile features verified. Publish toggle working. Influencer dashboard with Stripe Connect step-by-step UX working. FAB button visible on AI tab, does not overlap input. Test credentials: jcuradeau.7@gmail.com/Crypto2026! (mentor+vip+influencer)

backend_apis.GET /api/marketplace/offers: PASS - Returns offers with enriched pro info (rating, total_reviews, bio, badge, display_name)
backend_apis.GET /api/marketplace/offers/{id}: PASS - Returns single offer with enriched pro info
backend_apis.GET /api/pro/offers: PASS - Returns all offers including unpublished
backend_apis.POST /api/influencer/stripe/connect: PASS - Returns expected error (Stripe platform config)

frontend_pages.marketplace: PASS - Shows 'X offers available' subtitle, offer cards with mentor avatar, name, star rating (★★★★★ 5.0), review count (0)
frontend_pages.marketplace_modal: PASS - Offer detail loads (modal pro card with bio, rating/5, reviews)
frontend_pages.pro_offers: PASS - Shows 'My Offers' with draft/published status, stats, publish toggle
frontend_pages.influencer_dashboard: PASS - Shows Stripe Connect with 3-step instructions, stats grid, affiliate link card, tabs
frontend_pages.fab_button: PASS - FAB '+' button visible on AI tab, positioned in bottom-right, does not overlap input field

data_integrity.publish_flow: PASS - Publishing offer makes it appear in marketplace
data_integrity.unpublish_flow: PASS - Unpublishing offer removes it from marketplace
